name: thinkingisfree
description: Bold typographic Ghost theme for independent creators

show_reading_time.description: Display estimated reading time on posts

show_scroll_progress.description: Show scroll progress bar at top of page

hero_name.description: Top label shown above the headline, e.g. Hello, I'm Prem.

hero_bullet_1.description: First tag/bullet shown below the description

hero_bullet_2.description: Second tag/bullet shown below the description

hero_bullet_3.description: Third tag/bullet shown below the description

hero_image.description: Hero portrait or image displayed on the right side

post_hero_width.description: Post hero (header + feature image) layout: fullscreen or respecting page width

hero_scroll_animation.description: Enable hero section scroll blur/fade animation on homepage

hero_layout.description: Hero section layout: fullscreen or respecting page width

nav_layout.description: Navigation layout: fullscreen (with padding) or respecting page width

posts_layout.description: Posts display layout: grid, list (image left/content right), or carousel (horizontal scroll)
